name: Toasted Pita Chips
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Split each pita pocket in half with a sharp knife.
3. Cut each half into 6 triangles.
4. Arrange the triangles in single layers on cookie sheets.
5. Sprinkle lightly with garlic powder, if desired.
6. Bake for 8 minutes or until chips are lightly browned and crisp.
7. Store in an airtight container until ready to serve.
Yield: 8 cups (64 chips)
One Serving ≈ 1 cup (8 chips)
Calories: 96
Protein: 3 g
Fat: <1 g
Carbohydrate: 19 g
Fiber: 0.5 g
Cholesterol: 0 mg
Sodium: 161 mg
Potassium: 34 mg
